channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Amazon upsets ebook lovers by ending support for old Kindle devices - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Amazon upsets ebook lovers by ending support for old Kindle devices  The Guardian
  2. User anger as Amazon ends support for some older Kindles  BBC
  3. Don't Toss Your Old Kindle Yet. Here's How to Keep It Alive After May 2026  PCMag
  4. Your Kindle's not obsolete, it just needs a jailbreak - and I'll show you how it's done  ZDNET
  5. Got an Old Kindle? It Might Not Work Anymore. Here’s What to Do.  The New York Times

item.title: NVIDIA N1 Gaming SoC Surfaces on Laptop Motherboard with 128 GB LPDDR5X Memory - TechPowerUp
item.description:
1. NVIDIA N1 Gaming SoC Surfaces on Laptop Motherboard with 128 GB LPDDR5X Memory  TechPowerUp
  2. Alleged images of the long-awaited Nvidia N1/N1X SoC surface on laptop motherboard — board features 128 GB of LPDDR5X memory alongside 8+6+2 phase VRM  Tom's Hardware
  3. NVIDIA’s Upcoming N1 SoC For AI PC Laptops Spotted On Engineering Motherboard: 128 GB Memory, User Claims Launch Expected This Year  Wccftech
  4. NVIDIA's N1 SoC pictured on an engineering board with 128GB of memory for local AI  TweakTown
  5. Nvidia N1 laptop motherboard picture shows 128GB of LPDDR5x memory and Blackwell superchip  Club386

item.title: Xbox’s New System Update Delivers Overhaul Gamers Have Been Begging For - GAMINGbible
item.description:

  4. You'll soon be able to hide games from your Xbox achievements list  Engadget
  5. Xbox Finally Adds Fan-Requested Feature "After 20 Years"  ScreenRant

item.title: Google bakes NotebookLM, its research tool, into Gemini - Engadget
item.description:
1. Google bakes NotebookLM, its research tool, into Gemini  Engadget
  2. Try notebooks in Gemini to easily keep track of projects  blog.google
  3. Gemini Gets New Notebooks Feature That Syncs With NotebookLM  CNET
  4. Gemini gets notebooks to help you organize projects  The Verge

item.title: Frostpunk studio reveals dark and twisted farming thriller Crop - Eurogamer
item.description:
1. Frostpunk studio reveals dark and twisted farming thriller Crop  Eurogamer
  2. A new generation of dark, anti Stardew Valley cozy games has begun  Polygon.com
  3. Crop Is a Farming Sim Where You Bury the Previous Owner — And That’s Just the Beginning  Wccftech
  4. Crop is Stardew Valley except you arrive at your farm naked and in the boot of a car  Rock Paper Shotgun
  5. Twin Peaks Meets Stardew Valley In A Creepy New Farming Nightmare  GameSpot

item.title: Bikepacking mullet bikes are here – the new Kona Unity is the shred-ready adventure bike we'd been waiting for - BikeRadar
item.description:
1. Bikepacking mullet bikes are here – the new Kona Unity is the shred-ready adventure bike we'd been waiting for  BikeRadar

  3. Kona Announces Mixed-Wheel Unity Bikepacking Hardtail  Pinkbike
  4. Meet the New Kona Unity: 29" Front, 27.5" Rear, No Motor, 100% Steel, and 100% Real  bikemag.com
  5. The New Kona Unity Might be the Ultimate Bikepacking Vessel  Bikerumor

item.title: NASA just shared jaw-dropping Artemis II wallpapers — here's how to set them on your Mac or Windows PC - Tom's Guide
item.description:
1. NASA just shared jaw-dropping Artemis II wallpapers — here's how to set them on your Mac or Windows PC  Tom's Guide
  2. Artemis II Just Dropped Stunning Wallpapers For Your Phone Or PC  Forbes
  3. How iPhones Found Their Way Into Space  The New York Times
  4. LunarWall: Shuffle Moon Photos from Artemis II On Your Lock Screen or Mac Desktop  MacStories
  5. Artemis 2 moon astronauts capture space history — on their iPhones  Space

item.title: LinkedIn scanning users’ browser extensions sparks controversy and two lawsuits - Ars Technica
item.description:
1. LinkedIn scanning users’ browser extensions sparks controversy and two lawsuits  Ars Technica
  2. LinkedIn is spying on you, according to a new 'BrowserGate' security report — scripts stealthily scan visitors' browsers for over 6,000 Chrome extensions and harvest hardware data  Tom's Hardware
  3. New "BrowserGate" report claims LinkedIn secretly scans user browsers  TechRadar
  4. LinkedIn is secretly scanning your browser for 6,000 extensions, and you weren’t told  The Next Web
  5. LinkedIn accused of privacy violations by anti-scraping measures in US lawsuit  MLex

item.title: Road to Vostok's hot start on Steam has "secured the entire production budget" the Finnish survival shooter needs for "years to come", dev says - Rock Paper Shotgun
item.description:
1. Road to Vostok's hot start on Steam has "secured the entire production budget" the Finnish survival shooter needs for "years to come", dev says  Rock Paper Shotgun
  2. Hardcore Survival Sim With Deadly Twist Is A Smash Hit On Steam  Kotaku
  3. Survival shooter Road to Vostok 'secured the entire production budget for this game for years and years to come' within 24 hours of its Steam early access launch  PC Gamer
  4. Road to Vostok Medical Guide: Crafting & Healing [Guide]  games.gg
  5. Hardcore Single-Player Survival Game is Blowing Up on Steam  GameRant

item.title: Walmart Stops Selling Many of Its Popular Onn Google TV Streaming Players - | Cord Cutters News
item.description:
1. Walmart Stops Selling Many of Its Popular Onn Google TV Streaming Players  | Cord Cutters News
  2. This $30 Fire Stick replacement just appeared on store shelves with no warning  Pocket-lint
  3. A major player in the Google TV streaming space is making big moves with new hardware  Android Police
  4. Walmart’s new Onn 4K stick is already hitting store shelves, and the price is just right  Chrome Unboxed
  5. Walmart’s new $30 streamer is the Chromecast with Google TV replacement I’ve been waiting for  Android Authority
